Class BaseProjectileAttack

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
public class BaseProjectileAttack extends Object
Generic projectile model used by ranged/hybrid attacks.

Stores damage, movement vectors, travel range, owning player, and a JavaFX sprite.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected float
    currentDistance
    Distance already traveled since spawn.
    protected int

    Raw damage dealt on collision before defense reduction.

    Whether this projectile applies knockback on hit.

    range
    Maximum travel distance before auto-removal.
    protected float
    speed
    Projectile speed per update tick.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseProjectileAttack

      public BaseProjectileAttack(int damage, float speed, int range, float startX, float startY, float directionX, float directionY, Player owner, javafx.scene.image.Image image, float sizeMultiplier)
      Creates a projectile instance with sprite and movement properties.
      Parameters:
      damage - projectile damage
      speed - projectile speed
      range - maximum travel distance
      startX - spawn X coordinate
      startY - spawn Y coordinate
      directionX - horizontal direction
      directionY - vertical direction
      owner - player who owns the projectile
      image - projectile sprite image
      sizeMultiplier - sprite size scale factor

  • Method Details

    • getOwner

      public Player getOwner()
      Returns projectile owner.
      Returns:
      owner player

    • update

      public void update()
      Advances projectile position and accumulates traveled distance.

    • isOutOfRange

      public boolean isOutOfRange()
      Checks whether projectile has exceeded configured range.
      Returns:
      true if out of range

    • getSprite

      public javafx.scene.image.ImageView getSprite()
      Returns sprite node used for rendering and collision.
      Returns:
      projectile sprite

    • getDamage

      public int getDamage()
      Returns raw projectile damage.
      Returns:
      damage value

    • hasKnockback

      public boolean hasKnockback()
      Returns knockback flag.
      Returns:
      true if knockback should be applied

    • setHasKnockback

      public void setHasKnockback(boolean hasKnockback)
      Sets knockback behavior.
      Parameters:
      hasKnockback - knockback enabled state
